prompt: A witty cartoon educational illustration with clean lines and a warm palette: a friendly robot stands on a moving conveyor belt that never stops, catching one falling parcel at a time, peeking inside to guess its contents, then immediately tweaking the dials on its own chest before the next parcel arrives, an endless river of parcels stretching to the horizon. Style: clever XKCD or Kurzgesagt panel, expressive, one clear visual gag, generous negative space, warm colors, friendly and approachable. No text, letters, numbers, or labels anywhere in the image.
alt: A robot on an endless conveyor belt catches one parcel at a time, guesses its contents, then adjusts its own dials before the next arrives.
caption: Online learning lives one example at a time: predict on what just arrived, then update before the stream moves on.

after_heading: 2. Online Convex Optimization and the Regret Framework
prompt: A witty cartoon educational illustration with clean lines and a warm palette: a runner finishing a winding race while a calm coach in hindsight glasses points to a perfectly straight shortcut the runner could have taken in a single best fixed direction, the small gap between the two paths gently shaded. Style: clever XKCD or Kurzgesagt panel, expressive faces, one clear visual gag, minimal clutter, generous negative space, warm colors. No text, letters, numbers, or labels anywhere in the image.
alt: A runner who took a winding path stands beside a coach pointing at the single straight shortcut a perfect hindsight competitor would have run, the gap between them shaded.
caption: Regret measures how much worse the online learner did than the single best strategy chosen with perfect hindsight.

after_heading: 1. What Concept Drift Is: A Joint Distribution That Moves
prompt: A witty cartoon educational illustration with clean lines and a warm palette: a cartographer robot has carefully drawn a map of rolling hills, but the actual landscape underneath is quietly sliding and reshaping itself into new hills, leaving the robot's map mismatched with the ground it now sits on, the robot blinking in mild confusion. Style: clever XKCD or Kurzgesagt panel, expressive, one clear visual gag, generous negative space, warm colors, friendly. No text, letters, numbers, or labels anywhere in the image.
alt: A cartographer robot holds a map of hills while the real landscape underneath silently slides and reshapes, leaving map and terrain mismatched.
caption: Concept drift is the ground moving under a model: the relationship it learned quietly shifts while the model keeps trusting its old map.

after_heading: 3. Detection Methods: Error Monitors, Windowed Tests, and CUSUM
prompt: A witty cartoon educational illustration with clean lines and a warm palette: a watchful robot sentry sits beside a slowly rising pile of small error pebbles dropping one by one onto a balance scale, and the moment the accumulated pile tips the scale past a marked notch a little flag pops up, the robot alert and ready to act. Style: clever XKCD or Kurzgesagt panel, expressive, one clear visual gag, minimal clutter, generous negative space, warm colors. No text, letters, numbers, or labels anywhere in the image.
alt: A sentry robot watches error pebbles drop one by one onto a balance scale; when the accumulated weight tips past a notch, a small flag pops up to signal an alarm.
caption: Cumulative drift detectors stay quiet until small errors pile up past a threshold, then raise the alarm so adaptation can begin.

after_heading: 1. Catastrophic Forgetting and the Stability-Plasticity Dilemma
prompt: A witty cartoon educational illustration with clean lines and a warm palette: an eager robot painter enthusiastically rolls a fresh coat of bright new paint across an entire wall, gleefully covering over a careful old mural it had painted earlier, the old picture vanishing under the new color while the robot grins, blissfully unaware of what it just erased. Style: clever XKCD or Kurzgesagt panel, expressive faces and body language, one clear visual gag, generous negative space, warm colors. No text, letters, numbers, or labels anywhere in the image.
alt: An eager robot painter rolls bright new paint over an entire wall, cheerfully erasing the careful old mural it had painted earlier without noticing.
caption: Catastrophic forgetting is a model so eager to learn the new task that it paints right over everything it already knew.

after_heading: 2. The Three Families: Regularization, Replay, and Parameter Isolation
prompt: A witty cartoon educational illustration with clean lines and a warm palette: a studious robot learns a fresh lesson at a desk while keeping a small scrapbook of a few cherished old memories open beside it, every so often glancing back and rehearsing one old memory alongside the new material so nothing slips away, calm and content. Style: clever XKCD or Kurzgesagt panel, expressive, one clear visual gag, minimal clutter, generous negative space, warm colors. No text, letters, numbers, or labels anywhere in the image.
alt: A studious robot learns new material while keeping a small scrapbook of a few old memories open beside it, rehearsing an old memory alongside each new lesson.
caption: Replay fights forgetting by rehearsing a small scrapbook of past examples while learning new ones, so old skills stay fresh.
